subcodes.first_line: O ye discerning ones! The people of the world are lost in delusions, while the senseless ones are intoxicated with the goblet and wine-cup, a mere reflection of the divine effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هوشیار جهانیان مدهوش اوهامند و بیهوشان صراحی و جام مدام عکسی از پرتو تجلی
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
